name: Braided Water Hyacinth with Tufted Embroidery Square Storage Basket - Cloud Island™
description:
Stow everyday baby essentials in this Braided Water Hyacinth with Tufted Embroidery Square Storage Basket from cloud island™. This square storage bin features a braided water hyacinth construction that's detailed with cream tufted embroidery for sweet textured flair. Designed with attached handles for easy portability, this sturdy basket is great for stowing small toys, diapers and bath essentials, and is easy to spot clean.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
